headline: Super Micro Rises 5% as Margin Beat, Strong Guide Reignite Short Squeeze Debate
summary: Shares of Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI) spiked 5% in midday trading Friday to $35 and change. This move extended a sharp rebound that began after the company’s fiscal third-quarter results landed Tuesday afternoon. SMCI stock rallied as buyers continued to digest a margin recovery that caught much of Wall Street off guard. The move builds ... headline: US Said to Suspect Nvidia Chips Smuggled to Alibaba Via Thailand
